LanguageData.Make_BoS_Appalachia_T51_Power_Armor.desc: Paint a T-51 power armor with Appalachia Brotherhood Appalachia colors.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_Appalachia_T51_Power_Armor.labe: paint T-51 power armor Appalachia chapter
LanguageData.Make_BoS_Appalachia_T60_Power_Armor.desc: Paint a T-60 power armor with Appalachia Brotherhood Appalachia colors.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_Appalachia_T60_Power_Armor.labe: paint T-60 power armor Appalachia chapter
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T45_Lyons_Power_Armor.descripti: Paint a T-45 power armor with Lyons Pride 钢铁兄弟会 colors.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T45_Lyons_Power_Armor.label: paint T-45 power armor (Lyons Pride)
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T45_Outcast_Power_Armor.descrip: Paint a T-45 power armor with Outcast 钢铁兄弟会 colors.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T45_Outcast_Power_Armor.label: paint T-45 power armor (Outcast)
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T51_Power_Armor.description: Paint a T-51 power armor with standard Brotherhood Appalachia colors.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T51_Power_Armor.label: paint T-51 power armor Appalachia chapter
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T60_Power_Armor.description: Paint a T-60 power armor with standard Brotherhood Appalachia colors.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T60_Power_Armor.label: paint T-60 power armor Appalachia chapter
